name: pulsar-edit-mcp-server
description: This is a Pulsar Editor MCP

mcpServerPort.title: MCP Server Port
mcpServerPort.description: Listen on this port for MCP requests from your LLM client (default chosen to avoid conflicts with common local dev servers)

apiEndpointPrefix.title: OpenAI API Endpoint
apiEndpointPrefix.description: The OpenAI compatible API completions endpoint prefix of your LLM when using the built-in chat - everything before /v1/chat/completions. (Requires Restart)

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: The API key for authenticating requests when using the built-in chat

providerTimeoutMs.title: Chat Provider Timeout (ms)
providerTimeoutMs.description: Abort built-in chat requests that take longer than this timeout. Set to 0 to disable request timeout.

chatMaxRetries.title: Chat Retry Attempts
chatMaxRetries.description: Retry built-in chat requests this many times for retryable failures such as 429, 408 or 5xx responses.

chatRetryBaseDelayMs.title: Chat Retry Base Delay (ms)
chatRetryBaseDelayMs.description: Base backoff used by built-in chat retries when the provider does not return Retry-After.

chatRequestMinGapMs.title: Chat Request Min Gap (ms)
chatRequestMinGapMs.description: Minimum gap inserted between consecutive built-in chat completion calls to reduce provider saturation during proposal/apply loops.

chatContextMessageLimit.title: Chat Context Message Limit
chatContextMessageLimit.description: Maximum number of recent conversation messages sent to the built-in chat provider, always preserving the system prompt.

chatToolContentCharLimit.title: Chat Tool Content Char Limit
chatToolContentCharLimit.description: Maximum number of characters kept for each tool result in built-in chat requests; larger payloads are truncated before sending to the provider.
